headline: A Look At Microchip Technology (MCHP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Microchip Technology stock at a glance Microchip Technology (MCHP) has seen mixed recent share performance, with a 1 day return of 2.1% decline, a 7 day return of 7.4% decline, and a month return of 10.5% decline. Over longer periods, the stock shows a past 3 months return of 8.0% and a 1 year total return of 20.7%, while the 3 year total return stands at 10.9% decline and the 5 year total return at 9.8%. headline: New LX4580 is a Highly Integrated 24‑Channel Mixed‑Signal IC for Aviation and Defense Actuation Systems
summary: New IC features redundant architecture tailored for mission‑critical applicationsCHANDLER, Ariz., March 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Microchip Technology (Nasdaq: MCHP) today announces the LX4580, a 24‑channel mixed‑signal IC designed to streamline high‑reliability actuation control systems for aviation and defense applications.
